## Meeting Purpose

[Align on GTM campaign priorities and resolve blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Top Priority:** Accelerate the breakfast event campaign by adding more senders to the live HeyReach campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [**SIFT Automation Blocked:** The SIFT subscription is expired, preventing campaign launch. Copy must be generalized to cover engagement with both personal and company content.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [**Lead Gen Focus:** Enrich the Aeroffs Luma registrant list to fuel the active Lovable campaign and prepare for the CIBST launch.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [**New Experiment:** Test high-value lead magnets (e.g., a prompt-tracking guide) to improve post-event conversion rates.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Topics

### Campaign Priorities & Lead Generation

  - [**Breakfast Event Campaign:**](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
      - [**Status:** Live on HeyReach.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
      - [**Goal:** Accelerate outreach by adding more senders.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [**Lovable Campaign:**](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [**Status:** Active.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [**Fuel:** Leads from the enriched Aeroffs Luma registrant list.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [**CIBST & Recruitment Campaigns:**](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
      - [**Status:** Ready for launch.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Awaiting lead lists.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
      - [**Note:** Recruitment campaign is fully automated and will activate immediately upon lead upload.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)

### SIFT Automation Blockers

  - [**Subscription:** Expired.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
      - [**Action:** Naufal to renew.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [**Sender Accounts:** Need to be defined.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
      - [**Question:** Will Jason, Gloria, or Daniel be senders?](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
  - [**Copy:** Initial draft is too specific.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
      - [**Problem:** The opener ("Thanks for engaging with my content") fails for users who engaged with the GrowthX company page, not a personal profile.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
      - [**Solution:** Use a generic opener (e.g., "Thanks for supporting us") to cover all engagement types.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)

### Post-Event Conversion Experiment

  - [**Problem:** A 100-person monthly drop-off from event registrants to attendees.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [**Hypothesis:** The current lead magnet (event recording) lacks sufficient value to drive conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [**Experiment:** Test higher-value lead magnets to improve conversion rates.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
      - [**Example:** A guide on tracking AI prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
